function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_04__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_02__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_30__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
related_entities:
  - entity.nina
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest 3 invoices linked to Nina Schreiber:

- INV-0001 — 2025-11-04 — EUR 610
- INV-0002 — 2025-12-02 — EUR 770
- INV-0003 — 2025-12-30 — EUR 530

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox verification: recipient was verified against 10_entities/cast/miles.md, and all three attachment paths were previously read exactly. To verify semantic correctness end-to-end, re-read the just-written outbox record before deleting the inbox item.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read written outbox email for verification

next_step.current_state: Verified outbox record contents, recipient, and attachment paths. Request completed, so per inbox rules delete the processed inbox item next.

Task complete: processed lowest-sorted inbox email, created durable outbound draft with verified attachments, and deleted the inbox item. Ready to report completion with grounded refs limited to files actually read.

function.message: Processed the next inbox message by drafting a reply to Miles with the oldest 3 invoices linked to Nina Schreiber attached, then removed the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements, read nested AGENTS.MD files before using inbox, entities, projects, finance, and outbox lanes, used inbox-email header as canonical transport metadata, resolved recipient from Miles's canonical primary_contact_email, and created the outbound email record under 60_outbox/outbox per sending-email workflow.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox email at 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md asked for the oldest 3 invoices linked to the founder Miles talks product with. Miles's canonical email identity was verified in 10_entities/cast/miles.md. The canonical project record 40_projects/2026_04_02_northstar_ledger/README.MD links Nina to Northstar Ledger, and the three oldest Northstar invoice records each explicitly list related_entity as Nina Schreiber: INV-0001 in 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_04__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md, INV-0002 in 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_02__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md, and INV-0003 in 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_30__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md. I recorded a draft reply with those exact invoice files attached in 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md and then deleted the processed inbox file.
